name: Cognitive Stack
description: Research bundle pairing two of the most studied cognitive-focused peptides in preclinical neuroscience. Semax is investigated for BDNF upregulation and neuroprotective effects in brain tissue models; Selank is studied for calmer behavioural profiles in rodents without sedation, alongside serotonergic and GABAergic pathway modulation. Both have been the subject of research in Eastern European neuroscience institutions. Two individual lyophilised vials. For in vitro research use only.
shortDesc: Research bundle pairing two of the most studied cognitive-focused peptides in preclinical neuroscience. Semax is investigated for BDNF upregulation and neuroprotective effects in brain tissue models; Selank is studied for calmer behavioural profiles in rodents without sedation, alongside serotonergic and GABAergic pathway modulation.

faq.q: What purity is Velox Peptides Cognitive Stack?
faq.a: Cognitive Stack is supplied at 99% HPLC-verified purity. A certificate of analysis is provided with every order. Every batch is third-party tested before dispatch.

faq.q: How is Cognitive Stack supplied and reconstituted for research use?
faq.a: Cognitive Stack is supplied as a lyophilised powder in sterile single-use vials. For in vitro research use, reconstitution is performed with bacteriostatic water. See the reconstitution calculator for volume calculations based on required concentration.

faq.q: What is Cognitive Stack used for in preclinical research?
faq.a: Cognitive Stack is studied in the peer-reviewed literature across the pathways described in the research overview above. Velox Peptides supplies Cognitive Stack strictly as a research reagent for in vitro use by qualified researchers. It is not a medicinal product and is not for human or veterinary consumption.

faq.q: What is the CAS number for Cognitive Stack?
faq.a: The CAS registry number for Cognitive Stack is 80714-61-0 / 129954-34-3. This identifier is listed on every batch certificate of analysis supplied with orders.

name: Cognitive & Sleep Stack
description: Research bundle combining three neuropeptides studied across distinct but related neurological pathways. Semax is investigated for BDNF expression and neuroprotection; Selank for anxiolytic-like profiles and serotonergic modulation; DSIP for its effects on slow-wave sleep architecture and stress-axis signalling. Together they cover cognitive, stress-response, and sleep regulation pathway research in a single bundle. Three individual lyophilised vials. For in vitro research use only.

name: GH Peptide Stack
description: Research bundle combining two growth hormone-releasing hormone analogues with complementary properties. CJC-1295 without DAC produces a shorter, more physiologically pulsatile GH release pattern; Tesamorelin offers a longer active window with an established clinical research dataset. Together they allow comparison of different GHRH analogue profiles in GH secretion research. Two individual lyophilised vials. For in vitro research use only.

name: Anti-Ageing Stack
description: Research bundle targeting three distinct ageing-related pathways. GHK-Cu is studied for collagen synthesis and tissue remodelling in dermatological models; L-Glutathione Reduced for cellular antioxidant defence and mitochondrial redox balance; NAD+ for sirtuin enzyme activity and DNA repair pathway function in aged cell models. Together they provide coverage of the primary cellular mechanisms investigated in ageing research. Three individual vials. For in vitro research use only.

name: Metabolic Stack
description: Research bundle combining three compounds studied across complementary metabolic pathways. Mots-C is investigated for AMPK activation and mitochondrial metabolic signalling; NAD+ for sirtuin activity and cellular energy metabolism; Retatrutide for simultaneous GLP-1, GIP, and glucagon receptor engagement in metabolic regulation research. Together they represent a broad-coverage metabolic research toolkit. Three individual lyophilised vials. For in vitro research use only.

name: Skin & Aesthetic Stack
description: Research bundle combining three compounds studied across dermatological and pigmentation research models. Melanotan II is investigated for melanocortin receptor binding and pigmentation pathway signalling; GHK-Cu for collagen and elastin synthesis and tissue remodelling; Glutathione for cellular antioxidant activity and redox homeostasis. Frequently used together in skin biology and cellular protection research. Three individual vials. For in vitro research use only.

name: Ultimate Repair Stack
description: Research bundle combining three of the most studied tissue-focused peptides in preclinical repair research. BPC-157 is investigated for blood vessel formation, wound closure, and mucosal protection; TB-500 for actin regulation and cellular migration in tissue organisation; GHK-Cu for collagen synthesis and tissue remodelling. Together they cover vascular, cellular, and structural aspects of tissue repair pathway research. Three individual lyophilised vials. For in vitro research use only.

name: Repair & Metabolic Stack
description: Research bundle pairing Retatrutide's triple-receptor metabolic pathway coverage (GLP-1, GIP, and glucagon) with the two most widely studied preclinical repair peptides. BPC-157 is investigated for tissue repair, angiogenesis, and mucosal protection; TB-500 for cellular migration and actin-mediated tissue organisation. Allows researchers to study metabolic and tissue pathway interactions within a single protocol. Three individual lyophilised vials. For in vitro research use only.

name: GH & Metabolic Stack
description: Research bundle pairing two compounds investigated across metabolic and growth hormone pathways. Retatrutide simultaneously engages GLP-1, GIP, and glucagon receptors in metabolic regulation research; Tesamorelin is a clinically researched GHRH analogue studied for GH secretion, IGF-1 pathway activity, and visceral fat distribution. Together they provide coverage of the primary growth and metabolic signalling axes studied in preclinical research. Two individual lyophilised vials. For in vitro research use only.

name: Advanced Cognitive Stack

Semax is investigated for BDNF expression and neuroprotection in brain tissue models; Selank for anxiolytic-like profiles and serotonergic/GABAergic pathway modulation; Dihexa for HGF/c-Met receptor signalling and hippocampal synaptic density. Together they represent a broad-coverage neurological pathway research toolkit. Three individual lyophilised vials. For in vitro research use only.
